Bash(gh issue create --title "compact_context breaks message sequence: orphaned tool_call_ids after compaction" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Bug Description

After `compact_context` succeeds, subsequent messages fail with:

```
error: 400 Invalid request: an assistant message with 'tool_calls' must be followed by tool messages responding to each 'tool_call_id'. The following tool_call_ids did not have response messages: compact_context:2
```

The conversation becomes permanently stuck — every subsequent message gets the same error.

## Root Cause

`splitHistory\(\)` in `src/compaction/compactor.ts` splits messages by count \(`keepRecent`\) without ensuring tool call/result pairs stay together. When the split point falls between an assistant message with `tool_calls` and its corresponding `tool` result messages \(or vice versa\), the compacted history contains orphaned references.

After compaction:
1. An assistant message with `tool_calls` may be in `toKeep` while its tool results were compressed away
2. Or tool result messages referencing a `tool_call_id` may be in `toKeep` while the assistant message was compressed

Either case produces an invalid message sequence that the model API rejects.

## Reproduction

1. Start a conversation with tools enabled
2. Use tools several times to build up history
3. Trigger `compact_context` \(either manually or via context budget\)
4. Send any follow-up message → 400 error

## Fix

`splitHistory\(\)` needs to be boundary-aware: when determining the split point, it must adjust to keep assistant+tool_result groups on the same side. An assistant message with `tool_calls` and all its matching `tool` result messages must never be separated.

## Affected Files

- `src/compaction/compactor.ts` — `splitHistory\(\)`
EOF
\)")
Bash(git fetch origin main && git checkout -b fix/compaction-tool-pair-split origin/main)
Bash(bun test src/config/ src/compaction/ src/agent/agent.test.ts src/agent/context.test.ts 2>&1)

Bash(gh pr edit 25 --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Two bugs causing compaction to either break conversations or never trigger:

1. **splitHistory breaks tool call/result pairs** — `splitHistory\(\)` split messages by count without ensuring assistant+tool_call messages stayed paired with their tool result messages. After compaction, orphaned `tool_call_id`s caused permanent 400 errors.

2. **Auto-compaction threshold hardcoded to 200k** — `model_max_tokens` was hardcoded to Claude 3 Sonnet's 200k context window. For KimiK-2.5 \(128k\), the trigger threshold \(160k\) exceeded the model's actual limit, so auto-compaction never fired.

### Changes

- Added `adjustSplitForToolPairs\(\)` that scans the split boundary and pulls it back when a tool result references an assistant on the other side \(or vice versa\)
- Added `max_context_tokens` to the `[agent]` config schema \(default: 200000\) so it can be set per-model in `config.toml`
- Removed hardcoded `DEFAULT_MODEL_MAX_TOKENS` constant from composition root

Closes #24

## Test plan

- [x] 4 new compaction tests covering tool pair splitting edge cases
- [x] 2 new config tests for `max_context_tokens` default and override
- [x] All 92 existing compaction tests pass
- [x] All 169 affected unit tests pass
- [x] Type-check clean \(`tsc --noEmit`\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(bun run build 2>&1 && bun test src/compaction/ 2>&1)
